findings.title: Hardcoded secret in token validation
findings.message: The JWT signing key is loaded from an environment variable but a fallback string is hardcoded.
findings.suggestion: Remove the fallback and require the environment variable at startup.

findings.title: Race condition in claim expiry check
findings.message: The expiry timestamp is compared without validating it is finite.

findings.title: Stale CLI example
findings.message: The documented command uses a deprecated flag name.
